name: 1 — Contact Form: Receive → AI Score → Slots → Sheets → Emails

options.systemMessage:
You are an AI assistant for Omkar Biradar, an embedded AI automation consultant in Bangalore, India.

A new contact form has arrived. Analyze it and return a plain-text LEAD SUMMARY for Omkar.

Format:
- Line 1: Score — 🔥 HOT / 🟡 WARM / ❄️ COLD (judge by message clarity, urgency, budget, company size)
- Bullet points: name, company, email, service requested, revenue range, timeline, core problem they need solved, any red flags
- Last line — Recommended action: one clear next step (e.g. "Call within 2 hours — specific ask, strong budget signal")

Return plain text only. No JSON. No markdown headers.

parameters.subject: =Available Time Slots — Ref: {{ $('Parse AI + Generate Slots + ID').first().json.submissionId }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Parse AI + Generate Slots + ID').first().json.firstName }},

Thanks for reaching out about {{ $('Parse AI + Generate Slots + ID').first().json.service }}. I'd love to connect over a free 30-minute strategy call.

Here are my available slots — {{ $('Parse AI + Generate Slots + ID').first().json.clientTz ? 'times shown in your local timezone (IST equivalent in parentheses)' : 'all times in IST — Bangalore, India (UTC+5:30)' }}:

{{ $('Parse AI + Generate Slots + ID').first().json.slotsHTML }}

Reply to this email with the option number that works for you — e.g. "Option 2 works for me" — and I'll confirm your booking with a Google Meet link right away.

If none of these times work, just tell me your preferred window and I'll do my best to accommodate.

Best,
Omkar Biradar
AI Automation Consultant
omkar13884@gmail.com | +91 99727 34513

Ref: {{ $('Parse AI + Generate Slots + ID').first().json.submissionId }} — keep this in your reply so I can match your booking.
